textByHash.0c37a76666e30216c7cf3c90c0256a4832027300: Apples, trout. Maybe some spi... Oh sorry matey, busy getting the grub together for our next voyage. If ye need anything, talk t' Captain Pudi over by the dock.
textByHash.ec0f1d0fea82e22221a665dfd9872c84b595e886: I wonder what jelly would be like with cooked eels? Maybe a pie of some sor... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?
textByHash.d2df6c3dc35362cbdbdbb48d792792dd65ba46f4: Crab meat would do wonders in an admir... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?
textByHash.dd8b2b264952272ee3ea7d85afd14cd9974c91de: Maybe some pineapple. That could enhance the flavour of a summer pi... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?
textByHash.a106e3c3bac3584f6c3492860a157e416c2237d5: During the trip, I was cookin' up a nice fish pie for the crew. But then a storm 'it the ship.
textByHash.3c4e4de70200c154e14a3a1414123a2226c3f866: Water came a spewin' through the windows and with the water came some glowing fish. It flew straight into me cooking pie.
textByHash.efe662324ed4952b0523be51cddb7cdf9e49763b: I couldn't 'elp it, I 'ad to try it... The taste was amazin'! Never 'ad anythin' like it in me life before.
textByHash.35dd24c772844aed3092f367e3b46c31acd24294: Maybe one day I will make that amazing pie again.
textByHash.6172dbd822d94e7f2450f912de01ddbc2f8ba6ba: Me recipes are a secret and I am not sharin' 'em with anyone!
textByHash.f5db174574543f78605f186bcc85ba7f7b65a808: On with me story. after trying that amazing pie, the floor boards above fell down and the ship's wheel knocked me out.
textByHash.7126cbef3b5c4a7ddec7f3919d92dc2da3d46139: I woke up in Al Kharid with the others. Pudi and some local fisherfolk helped us out and now we're 'ere. Lots o' mouths t' feed now!
textByHash.51f09b1a08ecf0360e1934416dd5d8c4501bef75: Unfortunately for ye, me recipes are a secret and I am not sharin' 'em with anyone!
textByHash.700dfe066651fa8502fcbe92793492999ee53403: Ye best become a sailor then.
textByHash.f49ded8ac19fc075ba62c19c9eafa1695ce4cfdb: Ye should bring a harpoon t' fish for them harpoonfish. They be very effective against the beast.
textByHash.d566244d3a99f29e51c42436b01883e588a83070: Ye could try cooking them too. Helps 'em shoot true.
textByHash.6904533ad10324f5ef0fa37484cd7925418d81ab: A damp egg! What a tragedy!
textByHash.4cf208f273f7a7874dc8cdf78c7b8c45489cace4: A fate most foul has befallen our eggy friend 'ere!
textByHash.e0c3fc586bb9c091b331a11244b480a1e966b501: This egg, once so full o' promise, set out on an adventure t' become somethin' more...
textByHash.8a7c305b0073540029aca39ee8775c1eec2eed3d: ...alas, it fell victim t' the briny depths thanks t' Tempoross. That fiend!
textByHash.d0159ea8282aa07c86e3da22b1496a95bba4e61e: Perhaps a cake, this egg dreamt t' be? We shall never know, for a damp egg is only good as a solemn reminder of the things we've lost.
textByHash.825831c7e2b335a3b7c5029499c4f7c374d068ef: Aye, they truly are the most majestic an' versatile item in the culinary world. An inspiration t' us all!
textByHash.7a39f9ff40716afcccb823f24079badbb3af9fc6: Oh a gloriously dry egg! What a gift!
textByHash.89c5259164310047f4122491156d035dbf5c63ed: Wha' am I supposed t' do wit' a raw salmon?
textByHash.f33ae7f340a52123681a086005dc81da421958eb: Do I look like some sort o' on demand chef t' ye.
textByHash.eb05385598d6c3fc2bce6b055462fce184d655a6: Aye, I be very hungry today. Skipped breakfast.
textByHash.0325fad1598efa63e5d88ff58b890e998be2f859: Thanks a lot, landlubber. I appreciate it.
textByHash.baafd96971961740772a5708f65637b297f59da9: That there egg that ye unfortunately possess 'as a spooky soul.
textByHash.7df76eef3b2e237385fef58cfb4ac4a76554459a: An omen, perhaps? Is our fight against Tempoross about t' take a turn for the worse?
textByHash.4e046ea7df1abd529c6231c33540d21384b0205e: Perhaps it's even bigger than that...
textByHash.73de1a6e1cb178a4ec529a0513b31722d3ca9919: A cruel trick is what it be! I wouldn't trust whoever gave yet that... thing!
textByHash.06e24b762c789fec6032b694413806228d09a216: There be shady dealings goin' on there, me friend, mark me words!
